code:
stateDiagram-v2
    [Retail_CouponSystem] --> CLOSED

    state CLOSED {Retail_OrderManagement] --> Normal
        Normal --> IncrementFailures: execute_trade fails
        IncrementFailures --> CheckThreshold: failure_count++
        CheckThreshold --> Normal: count < 3
        CheckThreshold --> [Retail_PointOfSale]: count >= 3

        Normal --> ResetCount: execute_trade succeeds
        ResetCount --> Normal: failure_count = 0
    }

    CLOSED --> OPEN: Threshold Reached 3 failures

    state OPEN {Retail_Inventory] --> BlockCalls
        BlockCalls --> CheckTimeout: All calls raise CircuitBreakerError
        CheckTimeout --> BlockCalls: elapsed < 60s
        CheckTimeout --> [Retail_PointOfSale]: elapsed >= 60s
    }

    OPEN --> HALF_OPEN: Recovery Timeout Expired

    state HALF_OPEN {Retail_CouponSystem] --> TestRecovery
        TestRecovery --> EvaluateResult: Allow ONE test call
        EvaluateResult --> [Retail_CustomerLoyalty]: Success
        EvaluateResult --> ReOpen: Failure

        ReOpen --> [Retail_OrderManagement]
    }

    HALF_OPEN --> CLOSED: Test Call Succeeds
    HALF_OPEN --> OPEN: Test Call Fails

    style CLOSED fill:#4CAF50,stroke:#2E7D32,color:#fff
    style OPEN fill:#F44336,stroke:#C62828,color:#fff
    style HALF_OPEN fill:#FFC107,stroke:#F57C00,color:#333
repo_description: Finance feedback engine is an automated portfolio simulation tool using the LLM models of your choice.
compilation_error: [WinError 2] 系统找不到指定的文件。

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为零售优惠券系统画一个熔断器状态图。核心场景是：当订单管理模块连续失败时，系统要从正常状态切换到熔断，保护下游的积分服务。
明白了，所以起点是优惠券系统，然后进入一个叫CLOSED的状态？里面包含Normal和IncrementFailures这些子状态对吗？阈值设为3次失败触发熔断？
对的，CLOSED里面Normal是正常处理订单，每次execute_trade失败就走到IncrementFailures累加计数，CheckThreshold判断如果达到3次就跳转到Retail_PointOfSale触发熔断。成功的话走ResetCount清零。
好的，我先把CLOSED状态内部画好，包括Normal到IncrementFailures的失败路径，以及阈值判断分支。然后CLOSED到OPEN的迁移标注'Threshold Reached 3 failures'。
OPEN状态里面要体现完全拒绝请求，BlockCalls拦截所有调用，CheckTimeout计时60秒，超时后同样经过Retail_PointOfSale进入HALF_OPEN试探恢复。
HALF_OPEN里面放TestRecovery，只允许一个测试调用，然后EvaluateResult判断结果——成功的话回到CLOSED，失败的话要重新熔断？
没错，EvaluateResult成功走到Retail_CustomerLoyalty然后HALF_OPEN回CLOSED；失败的话走ReOpen，经过Retail_OrderManagement回到OPEN状态。
全部结构完成了。最后我加一下颜色区分：CLOSED用绿色，OPEN用红色，HALF_OPEN用黄色，这样一眼就能看出系统健康状态。
